name: comfyui
description: Generate images using AI (ComfyUI). Smart dispatch: auto-selects Flux (img2img, modify existing image) or Z_Turbo (text-to-image, create from scratch). Supports transparent background removal for sprites/icons. Use when the user wants to: create an image, generate art, draw something, make a picture, visualize something, generate a photo, create artwork, modify an image, remove background, create a sprite, or use Stable Diffusion / Flux / WAN image generation.

prompt.description: Text description of the image to generate. Include 'transparent background' or 'sprite' for background removal.

model.description: Workflow/model name (optional, auto-detected). Available: image_flux2 (img2img), image_z_image_turbo (txt2img), image_flux2_baackgroundRemove, image_z_image_turbo_backgroundRemove

negative.description: Things to avoid in the image (negative prompt)

width.description: Image width in pixels (default: 1248, auto landscape/portrait)

height.description: Image height in pixels (default: 821, auto landscape/portrait)

reference_image_path.description: Path to a reference/input image. If provided, Flux (img2img) is auto-selected.
